title: God Gave Me You
album: Loaded: The Best Of Blake Shelton
why_this_song: God Gave Me You by Blake Shelton (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause God gave me you for the ups and downs
God gave me you for the days of doubt
And for when I think I lost my way
There's more here than what we're seein'

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gave" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gave" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "downs" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "downs" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've made a mess of me

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "God Gave Me You" was released in 2011. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "God Gave Me You" foi lançada em 2011. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "God Gave Me You" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "God Gave Me You" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "God Gave Me You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "God Gave Me You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
